description:
A DeepSeek-native coding agent, for your terminal.

Reasonix talks straight to api.deepseek.com. The loop is append-only, engineered around DeepSeek's byte-stable prefix cache — long sessions hold 90%+ cache hit and input-token cost collapses to ~1/5. Terminal-first, leave it running.
What's Changed
- Localize desktop error notices by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6092
- fix(environment): persist probe snapshots so the prompt prefix stays byte-stable by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6093
- fix(agent): stop load-time repairs from masquerading as snapshot conflicts by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6095
- test: guard prompt-prefix byte stability at boot and desktop rebind level by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6094
- fix(sandbox): hide Windows sandbox consoles and fail lock waits fast by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6097
- test(agent): cover snapshot repair edge cases by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6100
- fix(ui): make every cost/cache readout match its labeled scope by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6096
- fix(desktop): surface actionable errors when session cleanup hits a blocked file by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6088
- feat(desktop): garbage-collect redundant recovery branches to trash by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6102
- fix(plugin): pin cache-hit MCP placeholder tools for the whole session by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6105
- Default Windows bash sandbox to off / Windows Bash 沙箱默认关闭 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6106
Full Changelog: https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/compare/desktop-v1.17.4...desktop-v1.17.5
